title: Consistent Dark Oak
description: Makes stripped dark oak match the colour palette of the planks
body: ## Conisitent Dark Oak * Makes the colour palette of stripped dark oak match that of the planks * Because consistency is key # More coming soon (•̀ᴗ-) #### If you like this, see my other resource packs ## Issues [![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49eac7d4916630c1ca7a85fe90f40e2363ae80eb.png)](https://discord.gg/W3T34eVScQ)
